approach: Deliver-only mission: the build node spec + build.feature are already FROZEN (status approved) since the #84/#85 build/bundle split. #89 is the follow-up impl mission that re-implements plugin build's OUTPUT SURFACE against the frozen AXI-contract scenarios -- no spec/suite change, no spec gate. Model the output on plugin bundle's AXI form delivered in #85: default TOON table via output()+printTable, --format json structured, aggregate summary line, next-step on stderr.

Give BuildResult per-vendor rows {vendor,path,status:built|skipped|failed} + a precomputed summary {built,skipped,failed}. build.ts: known written vendors -> built rows; unknown vendorExtensions keys -> skipped rows; per-vendor write errors -> failed rows (exit 1 if any failed). cli.ts: replace old --format json|text prose surface with default-TOON table (vendor,path,status) + 'built N, skipped M, failed K' aggregate + stderr next-step '-> universal-plugin plugin validate' emitted LAST. Empty state (no vendorExtensions) -> zero rows, aggregate 'built 0', stderr keeps 'nothing to build'.

auto-all: self-assert the impl gate within leash after the cold sdd-impl-judge passes every frozen scenario; user ratifies in-session. No hard floor in play -- purely additive impl against a frozen contract (no narrowing/compat/conflict). On judge PASS, advance the universal-plugin project spec approved -> implemented.

why: Implemented plugin build's AXI output surface against the frozen build.feature (#89, the follow-up mission the build node's standing disclaimer named). BuildResult gained per-vendor rows {vendor,path,status:built|skipped|failed} + a precomputed summary; cli.ts prints a default TOON table (vendor,path,status) + 'built N, skipped M, failed K' aggregate, --format json exposes a top-level 'built' array grouped by status + summary counts, and stderr ends with the next-step '-> universal-plugin plugin validate'. Empty state emits 'built 0' + 'nothing to build'. Modeled on plugin bundle's AXI form (#85). Cold sdd-impl-judge re-derived every scenario's oracle and drove the built CLI by hand across fixtures: all 18 frozen build.feature scenarios PASS, 0 failing, no regressions; pnpm verify green (171 tests). One judge-iteration correction (--format json missing the frozen 'built' array) recorded and fixed before this gate. No hard floor: purely additive impl against a frozen contract (no narrowing = no Clearance; impl newly built = no Compatibility bump; suite self-consistent = no Conflict). Self-asserted (by agent) within the run's auto-all leash; user ratifies in-session. Advances the universal-plugin project spec approved -> implemented.
